**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Beijing Epoch Auto Parts Co., Ltd. (formerly Beijing Tongxian Beishen Stamping Plant) is a legacy auto parts manufacturer established in 1989 in Tongzhou District, Beijing. With a paid-in capital of nearly 7M RMB, it specializes in automotive stamping parts and mechanical processing. A critical strategic indicator is its business scope restriction: 'Mechanical processing (restricted to off-site production)'. This explicitly reflects the impact of Beijing's strict urban planning and environmental policies, forcing the company to maintain its headquarters in Beijing while outsourcing or relocating its heavy, polluting manufacturing activities to surrounding provinces (likely Hebei). It operates as a typical Tier-3 supplier adapting to industrial decentralization.
